description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:git Docker image with a docker:dind service and defines a hidden .build template job that runs only on the master branch, is interruptible, and executes the following shell commands in order: docker info, echo "$CI_JOB_TOKEN" | docker login -u gitlab-ci-token --password-stdin=true "$CI_REGISTRY", export REGISTRY="$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE" IMAGE="$CI_JOB_NAME", docker build -f "./$IMAGE.dockerfile" -t "$REGISTRY/$IMAGE" ., and docker push "$REGISTRY/$IMAGE:latest". Place this job in the build stage. Then create individual jobs named android-ndk, cdev-alpine, cdev-arch, cdev-debian, cdev-debian-oldstable, cdev-rocky-8, cdev-rocky-9, cdev-ubuntu, and lua-testing that each extend the .build template, inheriting its image, service, rules, stage, and script. Add a needs relationship so that the lua-testing job depends on the cdev-arch job completing first.
